prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota 2GR-FKS (3.5L V6, direct-injection, 310hp stock) with a Magnuson TVS2300 supercharger (10psi boost, 500whp target) paired with a K&N Typhoon cold air intake and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system featuring Burns Stainless 304 race headers and a Borla Pro XS muffler for optimized scavenging

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Fidanza lightweight flywheel (11.5lb), OS Giken Super Lock LSD (4.10 final drive ratio), and a Tilton 7.25-inch twin-disc clutch with billet pressure plate for 2GR-FKS torque handling, mated to a Quaife ATB differential in the rear

Suspension overhaul with Öhlins TTX40 coilovers (2-way adjustable damping, 200lb/in front springs, 300lb/in rear springs) paired with Cusco pillowball upper mounts, Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, subframe, and differential mounts) for chassis rigidity
estetica: Custom Rocket Bunny LC470-specific widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with integrated carbon fiber side skirts and a custom 3D-printed rear wing mount for a dry carbon APR Performance GTC-300 wing (adjustable angle, 30mm pedestal height)

Full carbon fiber interior overhaul featuring a custom LC470-specific V Carbon Kevlar weave dashboard overlay, Bride Zeta III bucket seats (FIA-approved, 12kg each) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, and a MOMO Mod.78 carbon fiber steering wheel (350mm diameter, quick-release hub)

Aerodynamic lighting and functional upgrades including custom Hella Rallye 3000 Supertones (7-inch, 100W H3 bulbs) with carbon fiber housings, a carbon fiber hood with dual 4-inch NACA ducts (directing air to the Magnuson supercharger), and a custom titanium bolt-on tow hook (front and rear) with anodized red accents
